raw_response:
Looking at the PAPER.JSON reproducibility.commands field:

```json
"commands": [
  "git clone https://github.com/chen700564/RGB",
  "cd RGB && pip install -r requirements.txt",
  "python evaluate_rgb.py --model gpt-4 --split test --lang en"
]
```

However, these commands show a generic evaluation template for a single model (gpt-4) in English only. Table 2 in the paper shows "Error cases of noise robustness" with specific examples, not benchmark results across multiple LLMs.

The actual benchmark results table referenced in the paper appears to be Table 1 (noise robustness across different noise ratios for 6 LLMs in both languages). The commands provided do not specify how to reproduce the complete multi-model, multi-language results shown in any of the main tables.

Since there is no exact command provided to reproduce Table 2 specifically:

{"command": "NOTFOUND"}
